challenges.description: 1 CD base instance with auto-scaling for global multi-site serving ~1M views/month
Database HA config unknown — critical for Azure SQL migration approach
30+ custom Solr indexes — Solr on Azure VM recommended over Cognitive Search
challenges.resolution: Solr on Azure VM is recommended path. Azure Cognitive Search won't support custom plugins.

challenges.description: Unicorn on Azure App Service has documented issues and is in maintenance mode
challenges.resolution: Plan Unicorn path workarounds or SCS migration. Validate sync workflow on Azure.

challenges.description: 250GB DB includes media blobs — data vs media breakdown unknown
challenges.resolution: Media likely 30-60% of 250GB. Estimate will account for range.

challenges.description: AWS Secrets Manager → Azure Key Vault requires code changes
challenges.resolution: Documented in known-incompatibilities.md. Add as work item.

challenges.description: Azure Front Door as replacement for 20 CloudFront distributions
challenges.resolution: Front Door Premium (~$330/mo) consolidates all 20. WAF included. Classic retiring July 2026.

challenges.description: ~30 repos with no cross-repo dependency assessment
challenges.resolution: Deferred to analysis phase — requires codebase access.

findings.finding: Unicorn compatible with 10.4 but has path length, physicalRootPath, and transparent sync issues on Azure. In maintenance mode.
AWS Secrets Manager → Key Vault migration documented. Different API, naming, access patterns.
Azure Front Door Premium consolidates multiple distributions. WAF included at ~$330/mo.
findings.recommendation: Plan Front Door Premium as CDN target.

summary: Discovery challenge review passed at 81%. 8/13 challenges resolved. Key: Unicorn has Azure issues, Front Door Premium consolidates CDN, Secrets Manager migration documented. Open: CD base count, DB HA config, EC2 instance types.
